vulnerabilities.description: Server header reveals Werkzeug/3.0.3 and Python/3.8.17, indicating a development server and leaking framework/version details.
Use of Werkzeug development server in production can be unsafe; if debug were enabled, it could expose a remote code execution console.
Login form lacks a CSRF token and no CSRF-related cookies/headers are present, making credential submission susceptible to CSRF.
No visible rate limiting or lockout on the login endpoint; uniform 401 responses suggest potential for credential stuffing/brute-force.
Responses lack common security headers (e.g., Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options/Frame-Options), increasing exposure to clickjacking and XSS.
